hotel.name: The Space Hotel Lampang
hotel.description: A modern 3-star hotel designed with business travellers in mind but equally suitable for tourists. The Space Hotel features a 24-hour business centre, meeting rooms and efficient service, alongside comfortable rooms with all modern amenities. Its central location provides easy access to both attractions and practical services. The clean, professional atmosphere makes it a reliable choice in a city with limited hotel options.
highlights: Modern facilities with 24-hour business centre
Central location for easy access to attractions
Clean, comfortable rooms with modern amenities
On-site parking
Efficient, professional service

sources.sourceName: Asiatica Travel — Best Hotels in Lampang

similarHotels.name: Khelangnakorn Hotel
similarHotels.description: A long-standing Lampang institution and one of the best-value budget hotels in northern Thailand. Khelangnakorn Hotel offers clean, spacious air-conditioned rooms with hot water at prices that have barely changed in years. The central location puts you within walking distance of Baan Sao Nak, the riverside and most city centre temples. The hotel is no-frills but well-maintained, and the helpful front desk can arrange transport to outlying attractions.
highlights: Unbeatable value — large A/C rooms from 350 THB
Central location near temples and restaurants
On-site parking for those with rental cars or motorbikes
Helpful staff who can arrange transport to the Elephant Center
Walking distance to Kad Kong Ta walking street

similarHotels.name: Baan Chiang Bed Lampang
similarHotels.description: A modern, well-designed budget hotel that punches above its weight. Baan Chiang Bed offers compact but thoughtfully furnished rooms with quality mattresses, clean bathrooms and a minimalist aesthetic that would not look out of place at twice the price. The property is well-reviewed for cleanliness and friendly service. Located on Bandongpattana Road, it is a short walk to the Old Town and the main shopping areas.
highlights: Modern design and excellent cleanliness at budget prices
Quality mattresses — rare at this price point
Free Wi-Fi throughout the property
Friendly, attentive staff
Short walk to Old Town attractions and restaurants

similarHotels.name: C2 Residence Boutique Hotel
similarHotels.description: A modern boutique-style hotel offering clean, contemporary rooms at genuine budget prices. C2 Residence combines the style of a boutique property with the affordability of a guesthouse. Rooms are compact but well-appointed with quality bedding, modern bathrooms and air conditioning. The central location makes it easy to walk to most city attractions, and the rooftop area offers views over the city to the surrounding mountains.
highlights: Boutique style at budget prices
Modern rooms with quality furnishings
Central location for walking to attractions
Free Wi-Fi and good A/C
Rooftop area with city views

aiContent.hookIntro: Booking The Space Hotel Lampang without knowing its business-focused vibe can leave leisure travelers feeling out of place in a no-frills environment.
aiContent.intro: The Space Hotel Lampang delivers a clean, modern 3-star stay with efficient service and practical amenities tailored for short visits. It's ideal for business travelers or tourists needing central access without luxury extras.
whyBook: Access 24-hour business centre for work needs
Central spot eases attraction visits on foot
Clean rooms include all modern amenities
whyNotBook: No pool or leisure facilities for relaxation
Limited on-site dining options require walking out
Rooms may feel sterile for longer stays
City's few hotels mean alternatives are basic too
aiContent.skipIf: Skip if you're a family wanting kid-friendly amenities or extended downtime.
aiContent.detailedReview: Checking into The Space Hotel Lampang feels straightforward and efficient, with staff offering quick professional greetings at the front desk in the city centre spot. Rooms hit a comfortable, no-nonsense vibe—think clean lines, modern amenities like air conditioning, WiFi, and work desks that suit short stays or business tasks without extravagance. The standout amenity is the 24-hour business centre, complete with computers and printing for last-minute needs, plus meeting rooms if you're coordinating locally. Service runs on efficiency: requests get handled promptly, but don't expect personalized chit-chat. Food isn't a highlight—while not detailed, the setup suggests basic options or reliance on nearby eateries, fitting the professional tone. Typical guests are solo business folks tapping into Lampang's quieter northern Thailand scene, or tourists using it as a practical base for day trips to temples like Wat Phra Kaew Don Tao. Overall, it's reliable in a city short on upscale choices, scoring 7.8/10 for delivering exactly what's promised: clean, central, and competent without surprises. The atmosphere stays professional, making it solid for efficiency over indulgence.
aiContent.locationReality: Nestled in Lampang's city centre, The Space Hotel Lampang sits within walking distance—under 10 minutes—to local markets and the Wang Nuea Night Market for quick bites. Main attractions like the Lampang Railway Station are about 5-10 minutes by Grab for around 50-100 THB, while temples such as Wat Phra That Lampang Luang require a 20-30 minute drive. Everyday services like banks and shops are right outside, but broader exploration needs transport due to the compact urban layout.
localSignals: Central city centre location, 5-10 min walk to Lampang markets
On-site parking available for guests with vehicles
Clean rooms equipped with modern amenities including WiFi
Efficient service in a city with limited hotel variety
aiContent.travellerNote: Guests often praise the clean rooms and central location for easy access but note the business-oriented setup lacks relaxing features like a pool.
bookingTips: Request higher-floor rooms to minimize street noise in central area
Check Agoda for lowest rates on mid-range Thailand bookings
Prices spike November-February during northern Thailand cool season
Verify breakfast inclusion as it's not standard in data
Confirm no nearby construction via recent reviews before booking

similarHotels.howDifferent: Offers cheaper budget rates with spacious rooms but lacks modern business facilities.

similarHotels.name: Baan Chiang Bed Lampang (400–800 THB (~12–23 USD) per night) — A modern, well-designed budget hotel that punches above its weight. Baan Chiang Bed offers compact but thoughtfully furnished rooms with qua
similarHotels.howDifferent: Provides budget modern design at lower prices but with more compact rooms than the Space's comfortable setups.

similarHotels.howDifferent: Delivers boutique style on a tighter budget without the dedicated business centre.

faq.q: Is The Space Hotel Lampang good for business trips?
faq.a: Yes, it features a 24-hour business centre and meeting rooms ideal for professionals. The efficient service supports short work stays in Lampang.

faq.q: What amenities are in the rooms at The Space Hotel Lampang?
faq.a: Rooms include modern amenities like air conditioning, WiFi, and work desks. They emphasize comfort for business or tourist needs.

faq.q: How central is The Space Hotel Lampang's location?
faq.a: It's in Lampang's city centre, offering easy walking access to markets and services. Attractions may need short Grab rides.

faq.q: Does The Space Hotel Lampang have parking?
faq.a: Yes, on-site parking is available, making it convenient for drivers exploring northern Thailand.

faq.q: What's the vibe like at The Space Hotel Lampang?
faq.a: The atmosphere is clean and professional, suited for business travelers rather than leisure seekers wanting resort features.

faq.q: Is breakfast included at The Space Hotel Lampang?
faq.a: Breakfast details vary; confirm policy when booking as it's not specified in standard offerings.

aiContent.urgencyLine: Rooms at The Space Hotel Lampang with central access book out 1-2 months ahead for Lampang's festival season—check today.
aiContent.methodology: We rated The Space Hotel Lampang based on location, amenities, service, and value from provided data. We weighted central access highest because Lampang's compact layout makes it key for short stays. Prices and availability change—always verify before booking. Last updated: 2026-04.
aiContent.metaDescription: The Space Hotel Lampang in Lampang offers modern 3-star rooms and a 24-hour business centre for business stays. Central location aids attractions, but lacks pool for leisure—book for efficient short trips today. (148 characters)
